series_metadata.series_description: Includes informaiton about the type of lab kit for supplies requested. Listed onthe form is the requesting party, the available kits offered, the requestors address, and the date, the lab responded to the request.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in office area for one year, then store at the State Records Center. Maintain at the State Records Cener for four years until affected fiscal year is audited and completed, then destroy., Paper: Wastepaper
